title: Tạo mới Đợt Điều trị
description: Form thêm mới đợt điều trị

dataSource.loadQuery: SELECT TREATMENT_ID, TREATMENT_CODE, MEDICAL_RECORD_ID, PATIENT_ID, DOCTOR_ID, ROOM_ID, BED_NUMBER, TREATMENT_TYPE, DESCRIPTION, START_DATE, END_DATE, COST, STATUS, CREATED_BY, CREATED_DATE FROM DEMO_TREATMENTS WHERE TREATMENT_ID = :id
